description: Even low-confidence insights should have complete fields and honest confidence scoring.

insights.title: Possible overlap between two capture sources
insights.summary: Two recently routed signals reference the same regional water board meeting, but from different member captures with slightly different interpretations.
insights.whyItMatters: If the overlap is real, the coop should consolidate these into one draft rather than creating duplicate work.
insights.suggestedNextStep: Compare the two captures side by side and merge if they cover the same event.
